title: I Lived On Dread; To Those Who Know
content:
I lived on dread; to those who know
    The stimulus there is
    In danger, other impetus
    Is numb and vital-less.

    As 't were a spur upon the soul,
    A fear will urge it where
    To go without the spectre's aid
    Were challenging despair.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Emily Elizabeth Dickinson delivers a powerful performance in "I Lived On Dread; To Those Who Know"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
